name: agent-monitor
description: VS Code dashboard for local Codex chats and review status.

agentMonitor.codexHome.description: Path to the Codex home folder. Leave empty to use ~/.codex.

agentMonitor.claudeHome.description: Path to the Claude Code home folder. Leave empty to use ~/.claude.

agentMonitor.refreshIntervalMs.description: Dashboard and notification polling interval in milliseconds.

agentMonitor.runningActivitySeconds.description: A session without a completion marker is considered running if its transcript changed within this many seconds.

agentMonitor.notifyOnDone.description: Show a VS Code notification when a running chat becomes done.

agentMonitor.openOnStartup.description: Open the Agent Monitor dashboard when VS Code starts.

agentMonitor.pinOnStartup.description: Pin the Agent Monitor dashboard tab when it opens on VS Code startup.

agentMonitor.autoCompactOnReview.description: Send /compact to the agent terminal when a chat is marked reviewed.
